title: reptimeline: Tracking Discrete Representation Evolution During Neural Network Training
description: A Python library for tracking how discrete representations evolve during neural network training. Tracks per-code lifecycle events (births, deaths, connections, phase transitions) and discovers what each code element encodes without requiring prior ontological knowledge. Validated on three backends: binary autoencoder, sparse autoencoder (Pythia-70M), and neurosymbolic projection head.
